item.title: AWS CLI MFA Login
item.description: One of the basic but crucial things to secure cloud account(s) is to enable MFA. And restirct access to services for non-MFA authenticated users. This creates an issue for aws cli use. Due to the restricted policy, regular secret key & access key don’t work. A new temporary credential needs to be requested everytime you want to work with the aws cli. How can we address this issue? The Long Way Assuming you already have a default named profile setup like so,
